title: Royal Rajasthan Odyssey
shortDescription: Pink city palaces, blue alleys, golden dunes, and lake reflections.
overview: Trace the regal trails of Rajputana across four iconic cities. Sleep under desert stars in Jaisalmer, sip chai in Jodhpur's blue lanes, ride elephants up to Amber Fort, and watch sunsets ripple over Lake Pichola.

itinerary.title: Arrive Jaipur
itinerary.description: Welcome to the Pink City. Evening at Chokhi Dhani.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar.

itinerary.title: Drive to Jodhpur
itinerary.description: Via Pushkar Brahma temple. Overnight Jodhpur.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur Tour
itinerary.description: Mehrangarh Fort, Jaswant Thada, blue city walk.

itinerary.title: Drive to Jaisalmer
itinerary.description: Long scenic drive into the Thar.

itinerary.title: Desert Camp
itinerary.description: Sam dunes camel safari, folk music & dance under stars.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer Fort
itinerary.description: Living fort, Patwon ki Haveli, Gadisar Lake.

itinerary.title: Udaipur City
itinerary.description: City Palace, Jagdish temple, Pichola sunset boat ride.

termsNote: This is a standard itinerary shared to give you a clear overview of the tour flow and possible experiences. A final booking confirmation will be issued after your preferences and customizations are discussed.

paymentPolicy: Minimum 30% advance payment required to confirm bookings.
Full payment must be completed at least 7 days before departure.
Heritage hotel bookings may require additional advance during peak season.
hotelPolicy: Heritage room categories confirmed at booking; upgrades subject to availability.
transportationPolicy: AC SUV provided per group size and itinerary.
Vehicle is not at disposal; off-itinerary use is billed separately.
cancellationPolicy: 30+ days before departure: full refund minus processing fees.
childPolicy: Children below 4 years travel free with parents.
Children 5-11 charged at child rate without extra bed.
